  [1mTip:[0m Our most capable model yet. GPT-5.6 Sol can tackle complex code changes, dig into research, produce polished
  documents, and take on your most ambitious work. Sol is highly capable at lower reasoning efforts—try starting lower,
  then turn it up for harder jobs.


  [1mSelect Model and Effort[0m
  [2mAccess legacy models by running codex -m <model_name> or in your config.toml[0m

  1. gpt-5.6-sol (default)  [2mLatest frontier agentic coding model.[0m
  2. gpt-5.6-terra          [2mBalanced agentic coding model for everyday work.[0m
  3. gpt-5.6-luna           [2mFast and affordable agentic coding model.[0m
[1m[38;5;6m› 4. gpt-5.5 (current)      Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.[0m
  5. gpt-5.4                [2mStrong model for everyday coding.[0m
  6. gpt-5.4-mini           [2mSmall, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.[0m
